name: slides-toolkit
description: Google Slides generation toolkit — template-based deck pipeline via googleworkspace/cli (gws), backend-agnostic design knowledge (Minto / SCQA / chart-selection), and Platform-Pivot multi-backend architecture. MVP ships google-slides backend only; html / pptx / marp backends are Phase 2+ trigger-gated. Google Slides 自動生成ツールキット。簡報自動化工具組。 ⚠️ Claude Code CLI only — Cowork sandbox blocks Google Slides API calls.
